data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Local guide assignment', but the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that a guide is assigned, there are no specific details or evidence provided that demonstrate how this assignment is managed or validated through the system. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of how local guide assignment is validated or managed through the system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for guide assignment
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the local guide assignment functionality.
